learnings: Understood the fundamental shift from dynamic to static typing and its role in catching errors during development rather than runtime.

learnings: Gained knowledge on optimizing Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) and Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) through framework-specific features.

description: First day as a Frontend Developer Intern at InUnity Pvt Ltd.
